restaurant_openings.name: Here are the James Beard Award Winners From New England
restaurant_openings.summary: The annual James Beard Awards, often called the Oscars of the food world, returned to Chicago’s Lyric Opera on Monday, June 15. This year, New England took home three awards — none of them in Boston. Instead, the night’s wins went to the smaller cities that have spent years building ambitious dining scenes of their […]

restaurant_openings.name: The Governor Bradford Is Back—and Provincetown Can Exhale
restaurant_openings.summary: During a mid-May grand opening party, the new Governor Bradford in Provincetown feels remarkably like the old Governor Bradford. The interior is a bit different, […] The post The Governor Bradford Is Back—and Provincetown Can Exhale appeared first on Boston Magazine .

events_calendar.name: Frenzy for Two
events_calendar.summary: The innovative, Massachusetts-born Arlekin Players Theater takes on Eugène Ionesco in Artistic Director Igor Golyak’s adaptation of the great avant-garde playwright’s Frenzy for Two , about a couple too busy arguing to notice the destruction happening all around them—but in Golyak’s reading, the fighting both belies and perversely expresses a deeper mutual devotion. $54.50-$156.25, through July 2,
